2606.31557.title: CVE-TTP KG: Knowledge Graph Linking Software Vulnerabilities to Attack Behaviors
2606.31557.paper_summary: In the evolving threat landscape, adversaries exploit software vulnerabilities to launch sophisticated attacks, challenging traditional defenses. Although databases like CVE and NVD provide detailed technical information, they often lack links to attacker behaviors such as tactics and techniques, limiting effective threat interpretation and response. This work bridges this gap by connecting vulnerabilities with behavioral patterns from the MITRE ATT&CK framework. We construct a CVE-TTP Knowledge Graph that links CVEs to tactics and techniques using classification and relation extraction. Transformer-based models are developed for behavior identification, with CySecBERT achieving macro F1-scores of 87.71% (techniques) and 96.16% (tactics). Also, we created an annotated dataset with 24,820 entities and 43,608 relations for entity and relation extraction. The pipeline-based approach achieves macro F1-scores of 0.86 (entity extraction) and 0.99 (relation extraction), while a span-based joint model achieves 0.78. These outputs are integrated into a Neo4j-based Cyber Threat Knowledge Graph, enabling structured visualization of vulnerabilities.
2606.31557.paper_summary_zh: 在不斷演變的威脅環境中，對手利用軟體漏洞發動複雜的攻擊，挑戰傳統防禦。儘管像CVE和NVD這樣的數據庫提供詳細的技術資訊，但它們往往缺乏與攻擊者行為（如戰術和技術）相關的連結，限制了有效的威脅解釋和應對。這項工作通過將漏洞與MITRE ATT&CK框架中的行為模式相連接來填補這一空白。我們構建了一個CVE-TTP知識圖譜，通過分類和關係提取將CVE與戰術和技術連結起來。基於Transformer的模型被開發用於行為識別，其中CySecBERT在技術方面達到87.71%的宏觀F1分數，在戰術方面達到96.16%。此外，我們創建了一個帶有24,820個實體和43,608個關係的標註數據集，用於實體和關係提取。基於管道的方法在實體提取中達到0.86的宏觀F1分數，在關係提取中達到0.99，而基於跨度的聯合模型達到0.78。這些輸出被整合到基於Neo4j的網路威脅知識圖譜中，實現了漏洞的結構化可視化。
2606.31557.author: Basant Agarwal et.al.
2606.31557.authors: Basant Agarwal, Dincy R. Arikkat, Swati Yadav, Serena Nicolazzo, Antonino Nocera, Vinod P
